title: BlommsomEQ - Tack Library
description: This is a FORK MOD OF TRE'S TACK LIBRARY MOD, adding a couple of new things that I made and Tre's work too! I do have permission to make this fork from Tre personally.
body:
this is a FORK MOD OF TRE'S TACK LIBRARY MOD, adding a couple of new things that I made and Tre's work too! I do have permission to make this fork from Tre personally.

 

### [CHECK OUT THE ORIGINAL MOD HERE!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tres-tack-library)
### YOU NEED [THIS TEXTUREPACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blossomeq-tack-library-resourcepack/gallery) FOR IT TO FUNCTION PROPERLY!
  
  ![High Transport Boots form BEQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824509d81eb951f45f1b93afae667a4dd9db351c.png)
  
## What does it add?
- Higher leg wraps space, so they can go over the whole leg
- Halters and bridles now render nose and ears, so your fly masks can now cover ears
- Breast collars can now go over the neck

## I suggest you use this mod with these mods:
- [BlossomEQ](https://modrinth.com/mod/blossomeq-swem-tack-add-on)
- [Tre's Tack Shop](https://modrinth.com/mod/tres-tack-shop)
  
_#featurethemainmods #BIGBRAINS_
